title: Akku
overview: A Sequence of Murder is taking Place surrounding Hero and most importantly the victims are all close to him. Hero is searching the Culprit & Police Inspector also does the same since its his duty. At one point Police focus shift towards the Hero since situation makes Cop to suspect the Hero. Hero argues with Police Inspector and escaped to find the real Culprit. Cop chases Hero & Hero Chases unknown Culprit . We will find out the Twist in Silver Screen whether Cop Catches Hero or Hero identified the Real Culprit.
